reviews.review_description: I always wanted to run my own dinosaur farm - now finally this game helped me that my game became true. The game has a cool comic-like graphic and a more relaxed pace so it is great to explore. It is still early access so there is more to come - I am curious what is coming next!

What a fun idea! Looks good and the gun mechanics are fun. The dinosaurs are almost too cute to shoot. Ran into a few bugs and the run speed is a bit slow for me but other than that, it's fun. A shooting gallery like the tutorial page could be it's own game or even a good addition to this one. Playing with the guns and stuff is great.
Cozy nice game catch the dinos , and protect them by night

reviews.review_title: Has potential,but LOTS more work needed!
reviews.review_description:
I was gifted a copy by the developer.

This is in Early Access, so keep that in mind.

At the most basic level, the game works. You shoot dinos (an unspecified number of times) to make them vulnerable to teleportation with the pink & blue gun (but you can't shoot too many times or they'll die).

BUT, there are bugs and many missing features.

The walk speed is painfully slow, with no option to change it. There's a teleport option that doesn't seem to work yet.
 There's no smooth turning option that I could find (there are no options at all in-game, just a menu block that spawns facing away from you that only brings you back to the menu).

There's no onscreen indicator of your health during gameplay. 

You can't put extra ammo mags on your belt.

If I click the right thumbstick, it changes the appearance of my hands (which is strange but cool), BUT that results in the weapons completely going nuts and becoming misaligned with the hands, so you don't know where you're actually aiming.

I'm not trying to be too harsh here, I don't want to discourage the developer, but I have to be honest about the current state of the game.

I'll change the review if/when improvements are made.
